title: SZJJX Remote Control Cars – 2.4GHz High-Speed RC Car for Kids, 15KM/H+ 2WD Off-Road Car with 2 Rechargeable Batteries, Electric Remote Control Truck Toy for Boys & Girls Gifts (Green)
features: 🚗 High-Speed & Powerful Performance – Equipped with a strong motor and 2 x 3.7V 500mAh rechargeable batteries, this RC car reaches speeds of 15KM/H+, delivering a thrilling racing experience.

🎮 2.4GHz Remote Control & Easy Handling – Enjoy precise steering with the 2.4GHz anti-interference radio system, ensuring stable signal transmission and an extended 80ft control range, allows multiple cars to be played with simultaneously without interference. Perfect for beginners and hobbyists alike!

🏎️ Sturdy & All-Terrain Ready – Designed with anti-slip tyres, this off-road remote control cars handles grass, gravel, dirt, and pavements effortlessly. The robust chassis and shockproof build make it impact-resistant.
🔋 Extended Playtime with Dual Batteries – The RC truck includes two rechargeable batteries, allowing for 30+ minutes of uninterrupted fun. Quick and easy USB charging keeps the adventure going!
💦 Water-Resistant Design for More Adventure – No need to worry about puddles! This splash-proof remote control car handles wet conditions and even sprays water for extra excitement.

🎁 Perfect Gift for Kids & RC Enthusiasts – The remote control cars for kids age 3+ is an ideal Christmas or birthday gift for boys and girls who love high-speed racing and off-road challenges. Comes in an exquisite gift box for a premium feel!
description: Product Description SZJJX RC Car Remote Control Truck for Boys Girls, 2.4Ghz 15+KM/H High Speed 2WD RTR Electric Rock Climber Fast Race Buggy Hobby Toy Cars for Kids Gift Unique Exterior Design The independent frame, simulated cockpit, huge anti-slip tires, solid shock springs and powerful motors, each detail design of this RC car reflects the profession of our technical team. Sturdy Anti-slip Tires Four huge anti-slip rubber tires alleviate the impact of this RC car effectively when driving. They can ensure good adhesion of the tires on the road and improve the braking force of this RC car. Strong Shock Absorber We install the suitable springs so that it buffers the impact of the uneven and rough road, hence reduction of vibration to protect the car,the stability of the car body can be greatly increased. 2.4GHz Upgraded Version RC Car Specification: Product Scale: 1/18, Frequency: 2.4GHz, Speed: 15-20 km/h, Battery Material: Li-ion, Battery: 3.7V 500mAh battery, Playing Time: 15-18 mins, Charging Time: about 2-3 hours, Control Range: 50-70 meters, Remote Control Battery: 2 x AA(not included) Package Included: 1x remote controlled car, 1x 2.4G remote control, 2x 3.7V 500mAh battery, 1x USB cable, 1x Manual High quality PVC shell The car made of high quality PVC material, solid shock springs and powerful motors, each detail design of this RC car reflects the profession of our technical team. Crash Proof The front side of the car is modeled with a baffle to prevent collisions on hard edges, walls and prevent the car body for durability purposes. Motor-powered The car uses a powerful motor to turn on the wheel, runs on high speed when maximum power is provided. Sturdy Anti-slip Tires Four huge anti-slip rubber tires alleviate the impact of this RC car effectively when driving. They can ensure good adhesion of the tires on the road and improve the braking force of this RC car. Perfect gift for your children, families and friends!
